# Vendored: Unity 2.6.0

`unity.c`, `unity.h`, `unity_internals.h` vendored verbatim from
ThrowTheSwitch/Unity v2.6.0 (MIT). Used only by the host-compilable C core
tests in `client/test/` — never linked into the 3DS app. Excluded from C linting.

Source: https://github.com/ThrowTheSwitch/Unity/tree/v2.6.0/src
